_disclaimer: Illustrative framework — verify each cantonal implementation against current loi cantonale and AFC circulars before production use
overview: Loi fédérale relative à la réforme fiscale et au financement de l'AVS (RFFA / TRAF), entrée en vigueur 01.01.2020. Abolit les statuts spéciaux (holding, domicile, mixte) et introduit des outils de remplacement: patent box, super-déduction R&D, déduction NID (intérêt notionnel), step-up.

ZH.qualifying_income: patents and similar rights per OECD nexus

ZH.qualifying_costs: personnel R&D in CH + 35% overhead + 80% subcontracted CH R&D

step_up.description: Transitional step-up rules upon loss of cantonal special tax status (holding/domicile/mixte) at 01.01.2020 or for newly immigrated entities. Reserves latentes are taxed at a separate reduced rate over 5 years.

notional_interest_deduction_nid.notes: Only available in cantons with statutory ordinary cantonal tax burden >= 13.5% (currently only ZH qualifies).
